strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks (TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL alternatives, etc.)
Strong background in scalable architectures, micro-services, and DevOps (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD)
Proven track record of building and maintaining complex systems with clean architecture principles

response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional fullstack development skills with deep expertise in scalable architectures, DevOps, and multiple languages, including TypeScript and React. However, his 10+ years of senior-level experience and limited PostgreSQL exposure likely make him overqualified for a junior/mid-level role. His recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure may also not align perfectly with the renewable energy/construction tech domain.
